description.p: Open Terminal is a native C++ desktop financial intelligence terminal featuring real-time market data, AI-powered analytics, multi-broker trading, portfolio management, and 1300+ Python analytics scripts.

ul.li: Real-time crypto and equity trading (Kraken, HyperLiquid, 18+ brokers)
AI chat with multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Ollama)
Python analytics (equity, derivatives, fixed income, quant)
Voice commands via offline Whisper speech recognition
Visual workflow node editor with risk management
